legalStructure: Decentralized protocol and private-credit platform; exact issuer/legal structure for GFI requires further verification from official legal documents.
targetInvestors: Crypto/RWA users, governance participants, and eligible investors using Goldfinch private-credit products, subject to product-specific restrictions.

metadata.productScopeNote: This file is scoped to GFI as a protocol token. Goldfinch Prime or individual private-credit deals may require separate asset entries if Nexus RWA later tracks them as investable credit products.
